reviews.comment:
Caro. Atención desordenada. Mucha espera sin excusas. La verdad no tendrían que ir. Nada recomendables.

(Translated by Google)
Expensive. Disorganized service. Long waits with no excuses. Honestly, you shouldn't go. Not recommended at all.

reviews.comment:
Muy cara la NAFTA..el lugar es bastante completo. Hay que ir con tiempo por qué siempre hay fila para cargar combustible. Baño muy limpios. Hay servicio de lavado de auto.

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline is very expensive. The place has a good selection. You have to go early because there's always a line to fill up. The restrooms are very clean. They have a car wash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cUt2a3NnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te dejan esperando por quedarse charlando con los lugareños. Estuve más de 20 minutos esperando a que me atiendan, cuando me acerqué a un empleado, me trató con soberbia y mala educación.  Otro empleado se quedó charlando con una lugareños sobre la compra y la venta de un auto.  Tuve que retirarme sin ser atendida. Mala atención.  Y mala educación de los empleados

(Translated by Google)
They keep you waiting while they chat with the locals. I waited for over 20 minutes to be served, and when I finally approached an employee, he treated me with arrogance and rudeness. Another employee was chatting with some locals about buying and selling a car. I had to leave without being helped. Poor service. And rude employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cUtDekx3EAE
